prompt: Show me the sensor data for Elicio's Arendonk asset for March 2026.
assertions: get_asset_data called with asset_id=7de54b47, start_datetime around 2026-03-01, end_datetime around 2026-03-31
Output contains a sensor summary table (type, unit, direction, granularity, data point count), not raw data points
Steering status is reported (active/inactive or last signal time)
Access power value is reported if available
